prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科组最低位次约22512→24822→24964→30818，整体呈逐年后移趋势，近3年累计后移约8300名；2025年基准位次约30818名，较2024年后移约5854名 ，波动幅度较大；该校在四川省理科组招生计划2022年95人、2023年99人、2024年109人、2025年121人，持续扩招；2026年计划143人，较2025年增加22 人（+18.2%），扩招幅度明显，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流建设高校；软科2026年主榜约第55名，近年排名稳定在49–55区间，属中上水平全国重点大学；2023年高考周期内声誉评价为中性/混合（图书馆表白墙事件）；抖音热度总排名第102位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量较低；未见明显投档断档记录，报考心 理整体平稳；第五轮学科评估：作物学A+、植物保护A+、食品科学与工程A、兽医学A-、畜牧学A-，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热，但该校农林类主体专业社会热度一般；四川省2026年物理类考生估算约32.9万人（较2025年28.5万人增 长约15.5%），竞争压力显著增大；南京农业大学位于江苏省南京市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在四川招生占比约2.3 %（2025年），属外省中等规模招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+18.2%）对竞争的缓解作用、以及四川省物理类考生显著增加（+15.5%） 带来的竞争加剧，两因素基本对冲但扩招略占上风；在2025年基准30818名基础上，预计最低位次约33979名，区间33479–34479名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 22512 → 24822 → 24964 → 30818, showing a gradual backward trend year by year, with a cumulative backward shift of about 8300 positions over the past 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 30818, a backward shift of about 5854 positions compared to 2024, with significant fluctuation; the university's enrollment plan for the science group in Sichuan Province was 95 in 2022, 99 in 2023, 109 in 2024, and 121 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 143, an increase of 22 (+18.2%) compared to 2025, with a clear expansion rate, which alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 55th in the 2026 Soft Science main list, with stable rankings in the 49–55 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of national key universities; during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (library confession wall incident); overall Douyin popularity ranked 102nd, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure; no obvious record of admission cutoff breaks, with generally stable application psychology; fifth round of discipline evaluation: Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, Animal Science A-, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing stable attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular, but the university's main agricultural and forestry majors have average social popularity; the estimated number of physics category examinees in Sichuan Province for 2026 is about 329,000 (an increase of about 15.5% from 285,000 in 2025), significantly increasing competitive pressure; Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in this province, with no local enrollment preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2.3% (2025), belonging to a medium-scale enrollment from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the alleviation effect of the significant expansion in 2026 (+18.2%) on competition, and the intensified competition due to the significant increase in physics category examinees in Sichuan Province (+15.5%), the two factors basically offset each other but the expansion slightly prevails; based on the 2025 baseline of 30818, the estimated minimum ranking is about 33979, with a range of 33479–34479.
